resources.string: VENOLK1 Study Widget — shows streak, Pomodoro count, and timer
Notifies when Pomodoro session or break is complete
Prayer time reminders and Adhan notifications
Daily routine and weekly task reminders
VENOLK1 needs notification permission to send study alarms, prayer reminders, and Pomodoro completion alerts even when the app is closed.
VENOLK1 needs exact alarm permission so your study alarms fire at the precise time you set, even in battery saver mode.
VENOLK1 needs Usage Access permission for the App Blocker feature to detect and block distracting apps during your study sessions.
